scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
CAST(PerformanceDate AS     Date)     AS  Date     ,
DataSourceType                         AS     Data_Source_type     ,
Currency                              AS     Currency     ,
Cost                                   AS     Cost     ,
CAST(Clicks AS INT)                                   AS     Clicks     ,
CAST(Impressions  AS INT)                            AS     Impressions     ,
Account                                   AS     Account     ,
Ad                                        AS     Ad     ,
AdGroup                                   AS     Ad_Group     ,
Campaign                              AS     Campaign     ,
MediaType                              AS     Media_type     ,
PaidOrOrganic                         AS     Paid__Organic     ,
TrafficSource                         AS     Traffic_source     ,
DataSourceName                         AS     Data_Source_name     ,
DataSourceID                         AS     Data_Source     ,
CASE 
     WHEN TrafficSource='Bing'               THEN 'Microsoft Advertising'
     WHEN TrafficSource='Facebook'          THEN 'Facebook Ads'
     WHEN TrafficSource='Google'               THEN 'Google Ads'
     WHEN TrafficSource='Nextdoor'          THEN 'Nextdoor'
     WHEN TrafficSource='Pinterest'          THEN 'Pinterest'
     WHEN TrafficSource='Taboola'          THEN 'Taboola'
     WHEN TrafficSource='The Trade Desk'     THEN 'The Trade Desk'
     END AS Data_Source_type_name     ,
PerformanceDayOfWeek               AS     Day_of_week     ,
PerformanceMonth                    AS     Month     ,
PerformanceWeek                         AS     Week     ,
PerformanceYear                         AS     Year     ,
PerformanceWeekNumber               AS     Week_number     ,
Conversions                              AS     Conversions     ,
AdGroupID                              AS     Ad_Group_ID     ,
AdID                                   AS     AD_ID     ,
CampaignID                              AS     Campaign_ID     ,
Market                                   AS     Market     
FROM [EDW].[FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_BKP]
WHERE DataSourceName IN 
(
'Closet America - Guru'     ,
'Closet America - Swish'     ,
'Coatings - Swish'     ,
'FHIA Kitchens - Swish'     ,
'FHIA Remodeling - Guru'     ,
'IHM | CLA | Closet America'     ,
'IHM | MAC | Mad City Windows (Master Account)'     ,
'IHM | Renuity | Bath'     ,
'IHM | Renuity East | Windows & Kitchen'     ,
'IHM | RTW | Rite Window & Bath'     ,
'MAD CITY - Guru'     ,
'Mad City Baths - Swish'     ,
'Mad City Kitchens - Swish'     ,
'Mad City Windows - Swish'     ,
'Pacific Bath - Guru'     ,
'Pacific Bath - Swish'     ,
'Statewide Bath - Swish '     ,
'Statewide Kitchens - Swish'     ,
'Statewide Remodeling - Guru'     ,
'Statewide Windows - Swish'     ,
'Swish - FHIA (Renuity) Bath'     ,
'Swish - FHIA Windows'     ,
'Swish- Renuity West'        
)
AND CAST(PerformanceDate AS     Date) <='2026-06-21'',
